ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Continued To Oct-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kristen Bargmeyer appeared via zoom for Eric Young (executor).

Ms. Bargmeyer requested additional time to complete her filings, that she is waiting for final interest and statements.

The Court ordered the Order to Show Cause off calendar.

The First and Final Report etc., is continued to October 14, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Lozada. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Continued To Sep-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Kristen Bargmeyer (attorney) to appear on September 23, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. First and Final Report of Executor etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Continued To Mar-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kristen Bargmeyer for and with Eric Young, Executor (via Zoom).

The court acknowledged receipt of counsel's response to the OSC. Ms. Bargmeyer expressed a sincere apology for missing court and confirmed that a final Inventory and Appraisal was submitted for filing just prior to the hearing.
Counsel further stated that the petition for final distribution would be ready within the next two to three weeks.

The court accepted counsel's explanation and apology, ordering the OSC to be taken off calendar. The court continued the matter to March 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for the final petition to be filed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Continued To Feb-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The court-imposed sanctions in the amount of $250 on Kristen Bargmeyer under CCP Section 128. The court will issue a new order to appear for Ms. Bargmeyer and Eric Young, the executor, to appear on February 18, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. An additional Order to Show Cause shall be issued to Kristen Bargmeyer as to why she should not face further sanctions for her failure to appear at today's hearing.

The Status on Close of Estate hearing is continued to be heard on the same date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Continued To Jan-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
None.

The court noted the absence of Kristen Bargmeyer, counsel for executor Eric Young. An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Kristen Bargmeyer to appear on January 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and explain why she should not be sanctioned $250 for failure to appear as required. Hearing on status of Close of Estate is also continued to the same date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kristen Barmeyer appeared via zoom for Eric Young (petitioner).

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated January 21, 2004 is admitted to probate. Eric Young is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Prieto: Not reported.
